cast.name: 杰奎琳·杜普雷 Jacqueline du Pré
丹尼尔·巴伦博伊姆 Daniel Barenboim

writer.name: 克里斯托弗·努本 Christopher Nupen

director.name: 克里斯托弗·努本 Christopher Nupen

this_title: A Swan Song of Rare and Vanishing Beauty
introduction: 英国女大提琴家杰奎琳·杜普雷罹患多重硬化症后的生活、与丹尼尔·巴伦博伊姆合作演奏埃尔加大提琴协奏曲的珍贵录像。"Bookends" around the concert of Jacqueline du Pré playing the Elgar Cello Concerto with the New Philharmonia Orchestra conducted by her husband Daniel Barenboim with extra footage showing more details of Jacqueline's life when young and after she was diagnosed with Multiple Sclerosis in 1973 which cut a brilliant career tragically short.Written by Steve Crook <steve@brainstorm.co.uk>
chinese_title: A Swan Song of Rare and Vanishing Beauty
